meta.title: SaifKS Kingshot Hero Gear Database
meta.coverage: Hero gear enhancement 0-200, mastery 1-20, imbuement milestones, piece layout, stat formulas
meta.verification_status: cross-checked community data with documented discrepancy
meta.accuracy_statement: Designed for high reliability, but 100% accuracy cannot be guaranteed without official game data or direct in-game screenshot verification for every row.
meta.known_discrepancy: The published per-level rows sum to 502,000 XP for levels 101→200 and 575,320 XP for 0→200. Kingshot Optimizer's summary states 501,050 and 574,370, which is 950 lower. This database uses the auditable per-level row sum, corroborated by Kingshot Guide's Red Gear +100 total.

optimizer_xp.name: Kingshot Optimizer — XP Costs
optimizer_xp.notes: Displays incremental/cumulative XP and totals; site version 1.12.1 dated 2026-07-15.

kingshotdata_enhancement.name: Kingshot Data — Enhancement Chart
kingshotdata_enhancement.notes: Full per-level table. Historical publication date 2025-05-30.

h5joy_mastery.name: H5Joy Kingshot Data — Hero Gear Mastery

kingshotguide_reforging.notes: Attributes source to Aegy #70 game data.
